title: Prosthechea macrothyrsodes
taxonomy: Prosthechea macrothyrsodes is classified within the family Orchidaceae. This species is further placed in the subfamily Epidendroideae. The genus Prosthechea is part of the tribe Cymbidieae. The tribe Cymbidieae is one of the largest and most diverse tribes within the subfamily Epidendroideae. This classification is based on molecular and morphological studies of the orchid family.
